CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Set For Trial On Aug-23-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL (ASHLEY E. JOHNSON) PRO HAC VICE (FOR PLAINTIFF RWE INVESTCO EPC MGMT, LLC)

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to admit Ashley E. Johnson pro hac vice is GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Richard C. Darwin, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/RCD)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RWE INVESTCO EPC MGMT, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling: Plaintiff RWE Investco EPC MGMT, LLC's motion for the pro hac vice admission of Ashley Johnson is denied without prejudice to being refiled with proper notice per CCP 1005. Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HEK)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT RWE INVESTCO EPC MGMT, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT JOHN T. COX, III AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
